objective_metrics.evaluation_criteria: Lower is better for equivalent functionality

objective_metrics.description: Wall clock time with statistical variance
objective_metrics.measurement_method: Multiple runs with standard deviation calculation
5 sample runs per command with defined success criteria

objective_metrics.evaluation_criteria: Must be < 5 per CLAUDE.md rules or it's bloated garbage

objective_metrics.description: How well commands work with other tools/commands
objective_metrics.evaluation_criteria: Should compose with at least 3 other common patterns

quality_metrics.description: How clear and understandable the command output is

baseline_comparisons.manual_execution: Time for human to accomplish same task manually
baseline_comparisons.simple_alternatives: Simpler command combinations that achieve similar results

savage_evaluation_criteria.excellence_threshold: Commands that deliver 3x improvement over manual methods
savage_evaluation_criteria.acceptable_threshold: Commands that deliver 1.5x improvement with < 15% failure rate
savage_evaluation_criteria.trash_threshold: Commands with > 25% failure rate or negative ROI
savage_evaluation_criteria.roasting_intensity: Proportional to how badly the command fails to meet basic expectations
